title: The importance of territorial dialogue, reclaiming pastoral areas and promoting local products to sustain the sheep industry in the Drôme Valley
description: Outlines strategies to strengthen mountain pastoralism in the Drôme Valley through territorial dialogue, reclamation of grazing areas, and promotion of local sheep products. Presents outcomes of stakeholder workshops identifying actions to maintain multi-use pastoral lands, diversify grazing resources, and enhance value chain infrastructure for sustainable sheep farming.
